name: sophia
description: SophiaAgent MCP integration for research, writing, review, and swarm workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Academic research and writing swarm assistant.
interface.longDescription: SophiaAgent exposes a local MCP server so Codex can delegate research, academic writing, review, citation, data-analysis, and automatic swarm workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use SophiaAgent to review this paper.
Use SophiaAgent to research this topic.
Use SophiaAgent to draft a literature review.
